betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Fusion Plasma Types & Byproducts§f

§aChoose your fuel — each plasma type produces different power, byproducts, and neutron flux!§f

All plasma recipes take §e5 seconds§f at §e25 kHE/t§f.

§6Plasma Types (sorted by power output)§f:
§b• Deuterium§f: 20 mB D₂ → 1,000 mB He-4 | 750 kKyU/t → 1.0 MTU/t | 50 flux | No coupler needed
§b• Deuterium-Oxygen§f: 10 mB D₂ + 10 mB LO₂ → 1 Ionized Particle | 250 kKyU/t → 1.25 MTU/t | 50 flux
§b• Deuterium-Tritium§f: 10 mB D₂ + 10 mB T₂ → 1,000 mB He-4 | 750 kKyU/t → 3.75 MTU/t | 100 flux
§b• Helium-3§f: 20 mB He-3 → 1,000 mB He-4 | 500 kKyU/t → 3.75 MTU/t | §e0 flux (aneutronic!)§f
§b• Tritium-Helium-4§f: 10 mB T₂ + 10 mB He-4 → 1 Ionized Particle | 875 kKyU/t → 4.0 MTU/t | 500 flux
§b• Tritium-Chlorine§f: 10 mB T₂ + 10 mB Cl₂ → 1 Chlorophyte | 2.5 MKyU/t → 6.25 MTU/t | 500 flux
§b• Balefire§f: 15 mB BF Rocket Fuel + 5 mB Antimatter → 1 Thermonuclear Ash | 1 MKyU/t → 12.5 MTU/t | 2,000 flux
§b• Chlorine§f: 20 mB Cl₂ → 1 Chlorophyte | 3.75 MKyU/t → 10.0 MTU/t | 1,000 flux
§b• DHC§f: 10 mB Deuterated Hydrocarbon → 1 Chlorophyte | §e10 MKyU/t§f → §e25 MTU/t§f | 2,000 flux | Requires coupler
§b• Stellar§f: 10 mB Stellar Flux → 1 Gold Powder | §e10 MKyU/t§f → §e50 MTU/t§f | §e10,000 flux§f | Requires coupler

§6Ionized Particles§f:
• Produced as byproduct of several plasma types
• Can be §eduplicated§f: Mix + Hydrogen + Water → Ionic Gel → Acidize with Chlorinated Petroleum Wax → more Ionized Particles
• 50% duplication efficiency per cycle
§bUses§f: Flashgold RBMK fuel, Helium-4 production, Electronium, Schrabidic acid

§6Helium-4§f:
• Output of Deuterium, D-T, and He-3 plasmas (1,000 mB per operation)
• Used for: §bQuantum Processing Units§f, §bSchrabidium Batteries§f, ICF pellets

§eTip§f: §bHelium-3§f plasma produces §ezero neutron flux§f (aneutronic) — perfect if you don't need breeding! §bDeuterium-Tritium§f is the best general-purpose plasma for power + flux balance.
